strings.ITEM_CRITGLASSESVOID_PICKUP: Gain a very small chance to deal a huge amount of damage and activate "on-crit" effects twice. <style=cIsVoid>Corrupts all Lens-Maker's Glasses</style>.
strings.ITEM_CRITGLASSESVOID_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>1%</style> <style=cStack>(+1% per stack)</style> chance on hit to activate <style=cIsDamage>"On Crit"</style> effects <style=cIsUtility>twice</style> and deal <style=cIsDamage>800%</style> damage, or <style=cIsDamage>800%</style> TOTAL damage if activated by a <style=cIsUtility>skill</style>. <style=cIsVoid>Corrupts all Lens-Maker's Glasses</style>.
